name: envoys-coming
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, medium wide shot from eye level, beautiful young woman with brunette waves standing at the carved stone balustrade of the viewing terrace with the infinite starfield behind her, she has pushed off from leaning and is now standing upright with intent, her body language forward and serious, dark luminous eyes locked directly on camera with an intensity that makes the political personal, mouth open speaking with quiet urgency, one hand gesturing slightly as she emphasizes her point, warm golden light from the luminara avenue on the left side contrasting with cool starlight from the void on the right, her dark fitted dress with tech-line accents catching both light sources, the semicircular terrace and carved balustrade visible around her, Makoto Shinkai atmospheric lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: They'll send envoys. Both Thrones. They'll want to know where the most powerful Adepts stand. Including you.

name: retired-shopkeeper
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, medium shot from Sera's perspective, handsome young man with dark slightly unkempt hair leaning one elbow against the carved stone balustrade in a deliberately casual pose, the ghost of a wry self-deprecating smile on his lips — the first hint of humor in the conversation, dark watchful eyes carrying a glint of dry amusement beneath the guardedness, mouth open with a slight smirk as he delivers a line he knows will provoke her, dark mandarin collar suit slightly rumpled, warm golden light from the luminara canopy above catching his hair, the void and stars visible beyond the balustrade behind him with distant station-lights, relaxed body language that is clearly performed — he is trying to defuse the tension, shallow depth of field with warm bokeh

name: cant-hide
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, medium close-up from Idris's perspective, beautiful young woman with rich brunette waves, her expression has shifted — the challenge has softened into something more vulnerable and more dangerous, dark luminous eyes glistening with the look of someone who is afraid for the person she loves, mouth open speaking with a voice that has dropped in volume but gained in weight, the sharp edges of her composure showing the tenderness underneath, warm golden light from the left side catching her cheekbone, cool starlight from the right, her dark fitted dress collar visible, a single golden light mote floating between them slightly out of focus, shallow depth of field, intimate and raw, cinematic portrait quality

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: You can't hide in this place forever.

name: choosing
prompt: anime manga style, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high detail manga illustration, vibrant colors, studio quality anime key visual, medium wide two-shot from eye level slightly to the side, the young man with dark unkempt hair has turned fully to face the young woman with brunette waves, he is looking directly at her for the first time in the conversation with quiet conviction in his dark eyes — no longer deflecting or hiding behind humor, his jaw set but his expression open and earnest, mouth open speaking with calm certainty, she is looking up at him with an expression caught between exasperation and tenderness, they stand close at the balustrade with the golden luminara avenue stretching behind them on one side and the infinite starfield on the other, warm and cool light meeting between them, their dark clothing silhouetted against the golden glow, Makoto Shinkai atmospheric lighting with golden motes drifting around them
